name: stateful
description: Install and operate repository-local state, workplans, handoffs, roadmap planning, and archival review for Claude Code and Codex workflows.

interface.longDescription: Stateful installs a repo-local state system: a workplan DAG, session handoff docs, roadmap notes, gate policies, validation scripts, and Claude/Codex routing instructions so future agent sessions can recover context, plan from roadmap, archive completed work, and continue reliably.
defaultPrompt: Plan next Stateful tasks from the roadmap
Close this session with a Stateful handoff
